phoneticUs: 藢蓱藧l瑟伞o蕣藞tr蓱藧f瑟k
meaning: adj.(婀栨硦銆佹睜濉樼瓑) 璐惀鍏荤殑
examples: The composite ratio of oligotrophic bacteria and algicidal strain is 2:1, after separately training.
Therefore it is significant to investigate composition, physiochemical properties and water-chemical environment in the oligotrophic peat in China.
The research shows that the Chenghai Lake is a tsoda lake which is in transition from freshwater lake to saltwater lake and no longer an oligotrophic lake.
